Variables.Name: Schema
Variables.Description: The schema that this graph obeys

Variables.Name: Nodes
Variables.Description: Set of all nodes in this graph

Variables.Name: bEditable
Variables.Description: If true, graph can be edited by the user

Variables.Name: bAllowRenaming
Variables.Description: If true, graph can be renamed; Note: Graph can also be renamed if bAllowDeletion is true currently
